title: pinus sylvestris var. fruticosa
intro: Pinus sylvestris var. fruticosa, also known as dwarf Scotch pine, is a variety of the mountain pine tree, characterized by its compact growth habit and smaller needles. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus sylvestris var. fruticosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to create topical treatments, inhalants, and internal remedies.
